rows.label: xs33190100_MSG0010
rows.name:
So they crash-landed in a place like this.
I'm glad we found them[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33190100_MSG0020
rows.name: With this, we can expand our search radius.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33190100_MSG0030
rows.name:
Let's thoroughly search the perimeter
and regroup with everyone as soon as possible.[ST:wait ]
